all_props.medievalSublimation: Dissolution of gold into universal solvent—the nigredo purifying through oceanic immersion
all_props.vortexDynamics: 9-fold vortex rim—final whorl before return to center
all_props.therapeuticRole: Dissolves rigid ego-structures, facilitates visionary opening, enables compassion through transcendence
all_props.swedenborgResonance: Spiritual love flowing into natural plane—the influx of higher perception into earthly consciousness, creating visionary capacity
all_props.spandaResonance: Spanda of dissolution: −1 contracting into oceanic void
all_props.modernSymbolic: Imagination, dreams, psychic sensitivity, artistic vision, dissolution of ego-boundaries
all_props.harmonicRole: Dissolution threshold—carries consciousness beyond diatonic boundaries
all_props.name: Neptune
all_props.ancientOffering: Incense of sandalwood and lotus, dissolved in sacred water
all_props.orphicHymn: Oceanic vastness holding all forms in suspension—the waters of becoming from which all life rises and returns
all_props.kashimirUnderstanding: Neptune represents transcendent dissolution of boundary consciousness—the shakti that dissolves fixed perception into oceanic awareness. The recognition that all forms flow from undifferentiated ocean.
all_props.quantumOperatorFunction: Dissolution operator—transforms definite form into subtle potential

all_props.medievalSublimation: The philosopher's stone—final rubedo where all alchemical work crystallizes into living gold
all_props.vortexDynamics: 9-fold vortex center—still point of the turning world where all motion completes
all_props.therapeuticRole: Integrates shadow material, facilitates deep psychological transformation, enables reclamation of repressed power
all_props.swedenborgResonance: Spiritual power flowing into will—the capacity to transform inner realization into outer action. The descent into darkness preceding illumination.
all_props.spandaResonance: Spanda of return: +1 spiraling outward from void, gathering dissolved substance into regenerative pulse
all_props.modernSymbolic: Transformation, death-and-rebirth, power reclamation, shadow integration, regeneration
all_props.harmonicRole: Completion and return—carries overtone series to harmonic completion
all_props.name: Pluto
all_props.ancientOffering: Obsidian stone and pomegranate seed, buried and resurrected
all_props.orphicHymn: The underworld becomes the womb. What dies at the surface is reborn at the depths. Transformation through absolute encounter.
all_props.kashimirUnderstanding: Pluto represents the Möbius return where dissolution becomes integration. The power that brings accumulated experience into unified consciousness. Governs death-and-rebirth, alchemical transformation.
all_props.quantumOperatorFunction: Integrative transformation operator—collapses dissolved potentials into singular crystallized form
